other_observers: Originally identified by Peter Gent, posted on CO Birds by Christian Nunes.  Observed by myself and Carmencita Torres.  Many other birders have reported on ebird including Sean Walters, David Waltman and more.
description: Long grayish bill, darker near tip,   Yellow lores and facial skin. Reddish hindneck with long white neck and white belly. Blue gray upperparts with purplish maroon feathers showing.  Long yellowish legs. Seen walking between small islands foraging.  Also viewed preening on island.
photographer: Photographer: Dean Shoup, Dea, Dean Shoup, Dean Shoup, Dean Shoup
